title: Better Advancements HARDCORE
description:
Enhance Minecraft with 65+ brand new Advancements, all in the vanilla style.
Hardcore Edition!
body: This datapack is a different version of the Better Advancements datapack, intended for Hardcore players. If you want to learn more about it, you can check out the original version [HERE.](https://modrinth.com/project/better_advancements)
